codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit f738e4d against prior user-crud-admin blockers. Admin user create/update now validate userGroup existence before writes and return controlled 400 responses for invalid groups; admin delete now enforces last-admin protection. Added regression coverage in users.test.ts for non-existent group create/update and last-admin delete prevention.

summary: Pass: fix-scrutiny-user-management resolves the two blocking Milestone 4 scrutiny defects in user-crud-admin with matching regression tests and no new blocking defects observed.
